creator: freebsdbugs@thenode.info
text:
When trying to install the latest devel/ncurses I get the following errors:

=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.invisible-island.net/ncurses/current/ncurses-6.2-20210403.tgz
fetch: ftp://ftp.invisible-island.net/ncurses/current/ncurses-6.2-20210403.tgz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Attempting to fetch https://invisible-mirror.net/archives/ncurses/current/ncurses-6.2-20210403.tgz
fetch: https://invisible-mirror.net/archives/ncurses/current/ncurses-6.2-20210403.tgz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/ncurses/ncurses-6.2-20210403.tgz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/ncurses/ncurses-6.2-20210403.tgz: Not Found

Can you please update the ncurses version in the port?
